chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Rights of the Animal Upon Its Owner

text: 2471 - وَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : «لاَ تَتَوَرَّكُوا عَلَى اَلدَّوَابِّ وَ لاَ تَتَّخِذُوا ظُهُورَهَا مَجَالِسَ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2471 - The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace and blessings of Allah (swt) be upon him and his family) said:
"Do not sit sideways on animals, and do not make their backs your seats."
